assertions.title: All frontend tests pass (244+ tests)
commandsRun: package.json -> npm run test:frontend = vitest run

steps.action: Map the contract command to npm scripts
steps.expected: A frontend test script exists for the full suite
Frontend test files exist for the Vitest surface
steps.observed: 28 frontend test files were found under src/**/*.test.ts(x), including app, editor, teleprompter, store, lib, settings, and ui suites

evidence.notes: Static preflight only; the required `npm run test:frontend` command was intentionally not executed in this subagent.

assertions.issues: Final pass/fail must be confirmed by the parent validator running `npm run test:frontend`.

assertions.title: TypeScript typecheck and ESLint pass with zero errors
commandsRun: package.json -> npm run typecheck = tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit

steps.action: Map the contract commands to npm scripts
steps.expected: Dedicated typecheck and lint scripts exist
steps.observed: package.json defines `typecheck` as `tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` and `lint` as `eslint .`

steps.expected: TypeScript and ESLint configs referenced by those scripts are present
steps.observed: Both `tsconfig.json` and `eslint.config.js` exist and were read during preflight

evidence.notes: No full `npm run typecheck` or `npm run lint` execution was performed here by design.

assertions.issues: Final zero-error status must be confirmed by the parent validator running `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint`.

assertions.title: All existing test files pass unchanged (no regressions)
commandsRun: node -e "count test definitions in named legacy suites"

steps.action: Verify the contract-named test files exist
steps.expected: App, editor, teleprompter, markdown, events, store, and types suites are present
steps.observed: All named files exist: App.test.tsx, EditorView.test.tsx, TeleprompterView.test.tsx, MarkdownPreview.test.tsx, events.test.ts, modeStore.test.ts, scriptStore.test.ts, settingsStore.test.ts, and types.test.ts

steps.action: Record static test-definition counts from those files
steps.expected: Legacy suite sizes can be preflighted before the parent run
steps.observed: Current source counts are App=12, EditorView=59, TeleprompterView=88, MarkdownPreview=9, events=3, modeStore=13, scriptStore=17, settingsStore=10, types=5

evidence.notes: Counts were derived from source inspection only; pass/fail still requires the parent `npm run test:frontend` execution.

assertions.issues: The validation contract's legacy per-file counts are stale relative to the current source files, so the parent should rely on actual Vitest output rather than the historical numbers in the contract.

assertions.title: No circular dependencies between editor and teleprompter modules

steps.action: Inspect cross-imports between editor and teleprompter
steps.expected: Only the allowed shared/pure module boundaries should appear
steps.observed: The only cross-area imports found were `src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.tsx -> @/editor/MarkdownPreview` and `src/editor/EditorView.tsx -> @/teleprompter/viewportMath`

steps.action: Inspect the imported leaf modules for back-imports
steps.expected: The imported modules should not import back into the opposite view layer
steps.observed: `src/editor/MarkdownPreview.tsx` only imports React Markdown libraries, and `src/teleprompter/viewportMath.ts` is a pure utility module with no imports

steps.expected: Shared UI exports can be consumed by both views without crossing view-layer boundaries
steps.observed: `src/ui/index.ts` exports the shared UI primitives used by both EditorView and TeleprompterView

evidence.notes: Static inspection found no obvious circular dependency. Final confirmation still belongs to the parent validator's typecheck/frontend-test gate.

assertions.issues: No obvious static cycle was found, but the authoritative contract evidence remains the parent run of `npm run typecheck` and `npm run test:frontend`.

frictions.description: validation-contract.md lists legacy per-file suite sizes for VAL-CROSS-013, but current source files contain materially different counts (for example App=12 vs 8, EditorView=59 vs 13, TeleprompterView=88 vs ~28, events=3 vs 4).
frictions.resolution: Recorded actual static counts from source inspection so the parent validator can treat the contract counts as historical guidance rather than exact expectations.

frictions.description: Mission guidance still mentions a missing eslint.config.js, but the repository now contains D:/coding/somewhat/eslint.config.js.
frictions.resolution: Verified the file exists and treated the note as stale guidance rather than a present blocker.

summary: Completed static preflight for overlay gate assertions VAL-CROSS-011 through VAL-CROSS-014. The mapped npm scripts, referenced config files, and named test files are present, and no obvious static import-cycle blocker was found. Final pass/fail for these assertions must be confirmed by the parent validator running `npm run test:frontend`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run lint`.
